title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at JioMart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About JioMart Capital India:
JioMart Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart Capital India!
